items: Several performance improvements have been made.

sub: We added caching to prevent unnecessary restarts and scans when the Backup and Penumbra folders remain unchanged.
ShrinkU now only re-checks modified mods.
The Uninstalled category incorrectly displayed both a Restore and Install button; we have corrected it to show only the Install button.
Fixed minor UI issues.
We significantly improved mod initialization and startup performance.
Reduced hitching when opening the Main Window.
Mod list displayed incorrect mod names.
Update for 7.4
Penumbra Mod Setting’s “Open in ShrinkU” button caused transparent windows with extensive mod lists. We resolved this issue.
Fixed button text alignment.

changelogs.title: Performance Improvement, UI changes & New Backup Option

sub: The mod version and author have been added to the mod tooltip.
Statistics for backups showing how many PMPs are in the backup folder, as well as their total size (Settings window).
You can now back up and reinstall every mod you want.
You can reinstall deleted backed-up mods in Penumbra using ShrinkU.
We added a button to the Penumbra mod settings that opens Shrinku and displays the selected mod.
Right-clicking a mod in ShrinkU now allows you to exclude it from conversion.
The Penumbra Mod folder, or the folder in which Shrinku saved the mod with a backup, can now be opened via the context menu of a mod.
Some Minor UI changes
Correct display behavior of the mod-level checkbox - no checkbox for non-convertible mods.
Robustness improvements and debug logging around backup and restore steps.
Backup, Conversion and Restore Logic.
Much UI Improvements
Removed Zip backup for Textures. We rely on full Mod backup here because the size is not really significant greater. Also a full mod backup is safer.
Removed some Sort Options

changelogs.title: Improved Mod handling
changelogs.description: This release refines workflow efficiency and adds more robust handling for mod data integrity.

sub: Updates show release notes automatically.
Backup consistency improved across conversions, restorations.
Version tracking and dedicated UI window added.
Settings panel includes release notes button.
Mod backup support via PMP archives.
Full mod backups configurable option added.
Communication between ShrinkU and Sphene or other Plugins that control it
Automatic outdated backup removal enabled.
Conversion UI supports persistent expand/collapse controls
Backup version comparison with metadata extraction
Indicator when “Penumbra used only” mode is active to explain why not all mods appear in lists.
Mod-level checkbox displays correctly for all mods.
Backup and restore now log errors.
Crisper header font for changelog window.
Mod-level checkbox hidden for incompatible textures
Persistent expansion state for conversion UI
Automatic mode settings display improved clarity.
Outdated backups and session folders removed automatically.
Empty backup directories removed after cleanup.
Faster backups with intelligent version comparisons

changelogs.title: Improved Mod handling
changelogs.description: This release refines workflow efficiency and adds more robust handling for mod data integrity.

sub: Interactive tag chips replace comma input.
Changes are now saved instantly.
Colored table layout with size indicators, totals footer.
Backup service reports success reliably.
Empty mod folders automatically cleaned after operations.
Excluded tag changes trigger immediate notifications.
UI columns show uncompressed and compressed sizes.
Backup entry file restoration accuracy improved.
Automatic tag tracking reduces manual input.
Mod automatically restored on conversion cancel.
UI data consistently reflects current progress
Faster file lookups with relative paths.

changelogs.title: Initital Commit
changelogs.description: ShrinkU started here with basic functionality for converting mods and creating backups .
